<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Arch\Concerns; use Pest\Arch\Options\TestCaseOptions; /** * @internal */ trait Architectable // @phpstan-ignore-line { /** * The options to use when generating the architecture. */ private ?TestCaseOptions $options = null; /** * Returns the architecture options. */ public function arch(): TestCaseOptions { $options = $this->options ??= new TestCaseOptions; return $this->options = $options; } }
